query:
SELECT a.id, a.status, a."contactRevealed", a."revealedAt", u.name as worker_name, u.phone as worker_phone
FROM applications a
JOIN users u ON u.id = a."workerId"
WHERE a.status = 'offered'
ORDER BY a."createdAt" DESC
LIMIT 20;
